/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  --generate-code=arch=compute_52,code=[compute_52,sm_52] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm.dir/src/vector_add.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/mini_cuda_llm.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib   -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
